text: The subject property consists of a two-unit retail/service commercial building with a gross building area of 5,580 square feet. The building was originally constructed in 1914 and reflects traditional downtown commercial characteristics, including high site coverage and minimal setbacks. The improvements are utilized for motorcycle repair and retail sales, featuring a combination of retail storefront and service bay/workshop areas. Interior finishes include commercial vinyl tile flooring in the retail area and exposed structural elements in the rear workshop space, with ceiling heights of approximately 11 to 12 feet. The building's physical layout and condition are considered typical for its age and market location, and it is functionally adequate for ongoing or future retail/service use.
